untranslatable_reason: Signal requires Johansen cointegration test, eigenvector computation, and optimal capital weight calculation between two separate currency pairs (AUD.USD and CAD.USD). These are multivariate statistical tests and cross-pair analyses that cannot be expressed using single-pair technical indicators. The signal also references ZAR.USD pairs. This requires external cointegration analysis outside the backtest engine's indicator scope.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally about statistical arbitrage via cointegration testing rather than price-action or momentum patterns. It requires: (1) Johansen test implementation on two separate instrument series, (2) eigenvector-based position sizing across multiple pairs, (3) periodic rebalancing logic to manage accumulated P&L drift. The backtest engine would need to support multi-leg statistical testing and dynamic position weight calculations based on cointegration parameters, which exceeds the allowed indicator set. Recommend implementing as custom strategy module outside standard rule engine.
